wins.event: Q3 revenue $6.8B record, +18% YoY; Data Center $3.5B (+122% YoY)
2024 Data Center GPU guidance raised again to $5B+ (from $4.5B); 2.5x original $2B start-of-year
Turin (5th-gen EPYC) launched with 130+ performance records; broad cloud and OEM adoption planned
ZT Systems acquisition announced (one of largest AI infrastructure providers to hyperscalers)
Client revenue $1.9B, +29% YoY on Zen 5 / Ryzen 9000 / Ryzen AI 300 ramp

risks.event: Gaming segment revenue $462M, -69% YoY on semi-custom inventory drawdown
Embedded revenue $927M, -25% YoY; recovery only gradual; industrial market softness persists
ZT divestiture of manufacturing arm planned at close; regulatory approval still pending

guidance.notes: DC GPU 2024 guidance raised again to $5B+ (from $4.5B set last quarter). AI accelerator TAM raised to $500B by 2028 (vs prior $400B by 2027).

_notes: Fourth consecutive DC GPU guidance raise. Lisa Su's 10th anniversary as CEO; visible confidence. Gaming/Embedded weakness persists but the AI/DC story dominates.
